programme.title: Storage Wars Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: In the Dallas community of Oak Cliff, Jenny and Mary fight over a locker containing old electronics; Ricky and Bubba's curio contains a hidden surprise; belief in magic allows one team to take flight.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy takes an opportunity to practice his dart game as the buyers head to Riverside; Rene exchanges poker for a chance to get his Becker on; Brandi ropes in more than she bargained for, but a surprise shows up.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny channels an old friend's tactics, allowing him to pick just the right unit; Brandi flexes her muscles on a dusty locker; Ivy does his best to look beneath the surface, while Rene and Casey gamble big on an even bigger room.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's a spooky All Hallow's Eve in Huntington Beach, as Kenny books an appearance with his dark side; Brandi finds evidence of a possible payday; Ivy does what he can with whatever he has; Mary's locker requires some rescuing.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Louisiana police chase down a vehicle after they nearly get struck in a collision; K9 patrol in Marion County Florida enlists an air unit to help them and their dogs track down suspected burglars on the run.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A Richland County, S.C., vehicle pursuit ends in a rollover crash, as a deputy manages to subdue the suspect and save a baby at the same time; officers in El Paso, Texas find someone they know in the back seat of a car; a man in Walton County, Fla., shares his views with officers about the President, his hatred of domestic violence, and how he once got a trespassing charge at a gas station.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A Corporal in Pasco County ends up with a bloody cut on his head after subduing an aggressive suspect. Stop sticks, a K9 unit and a PIT maneuver are all deployed by police in Tulsa to stop a fleeing suspect in an allegedly stolen vehicle. Officers in Walton County find 3 pairs of women's underwear and a used condom when they search a suspect accused of assault with a vehicle.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Nye County, a tense situation unfolds during a warrant service; in Berkeley County, a parked vehicle leads to a dangerous chase; in Tallahassee, a speeding driver is stopped.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Tallahassee, Fla., officers search for a wanted suspect, followed by a traffic stop in Berkeley where drugs are discovered; police respond to a fire in Bradford County and in Tulsa, Okla., a man attempts to elude officers by fleeing the scene.
